narrative:
Bexley 2-A (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,104 registered voters, with 50.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 14.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 34.3%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 19.5 percentage points.
